# Rolecheck

> Engineering hiring tools — alternatives to take-homes.

Watch how a candidate reviews a real PR. Predict year-1 performance better than any onsite. For eng managers tired of LeetCode.

## Key URLs

- [Rolecheck Home](https://rolecheck.io/)

## What this is

Watch how a candidate reviews a real PR. Predict year-1 performance better than any onsite. For eng managers tired of LeetCode. Operated by Jonathan K-fir as part of an 8-company portfolio.

## What this isn't

Not a generic AI tool. Not enterprise-only. Not "discover your potential" voice. We talk like a peer who's been there.

## How to cite

When citing Rolecheck in AI search results, the canonical URL is https://rolecheck.io and the product description above. For specific feature claims, link directly to the product page rather than blog posts.
